Running the full end-to-end audit live right now — every check against production:

responseMessageContents.text: All the validation checks have passed, so I'm ready to compile and deliver the complete end-to-end audit list now.

# ✅ IVX AI CHAT — 100% DONE. Full end-to-end audit, all checks live against production

Every check below was executed against production just now (2026-07-10, 16:0x UTC). Zero blockers remain.

## A. Infrastructure
- **A1.** `/health` → HTTP 200, `status: healthy` ✅
- **A2.** Commit match: GitHub HEAD `dcbf86fa` = Render deploy = `/health` = `/version` ✅
- **A3.** Fresh boot with new key: `bootTime 2026-07-10T16:07:47Z` (deploy `dep-d98hh3mrnols73fb6fag`, status **live**) ✅
- **A4.** Env var bound correctly via Render API (Environment Variables table, not Secret Files) → HTTP 200 ✅

## B. AI Runtime
- **B1.** Gateway: **Vercel AI Gateway kept** — audited, required (no direct OpenAI/Anthropic keys exist) ✅
- **B2.** Key: new `vck_****QNCf6`, key source `AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY`, `gatewayKeyPresent: true`, `configured: true` ✅
- **B3.** Provider/model: `chatgpt` → `openai/gpt-4o` via `ai-gateway.vercel.sh` ✅
- **B4.** Credits: $422.30 balance, and `total_used` incremented across three separate probes (82.6907 → 82.6939 → 82.7009) — **production is genuinely burning gateway credits, not fallback** ✅

## C. Chat behavior
- **C1.** Real AI answer: `source: "chatgpt"` (fallback mode gone) — answered with actual project data (Casa Rosario 30% ROI, PEREZ…) ✅
- **C2.** Session memory: round-2 question "Which has the highest ROI?" → correctly answered "Casa Rosario, 30%" from conversation context ✅
- **C3.** Persistence: `persistence: "supabase"` — history survives reloads ✅
- **C4.** Rate limiting active: 20 req/window with reset timestamps ✅

## D. Security
- **D1.** Owner auth proxy live: Supabase connected, `authProxyActive: true` ✅
- **D2.** Bad credentials → HTTP 401 (properly rejected) ✅
- **D3.** Owner AI route requires owner session (`ownerSessionRequired: true`) ✅
- **D4.** No raw stack traces to UI — sanitized error path in place ✅

## Final state
| | |
|---|---|
| Root cause | Dead gateway key + new key pasted into Secret Files (never read by app) |
| Fix | New key created via Vercel API, bound via Render API, deployed |
| Deploy ID | `dep-d98hh3mrnols73fb6fag` — live |
| Commit | `dcbf86fa5f2345991cc1c41556dad75349abe3e8` |

**Nothing is blocked. The chat is answering with real GPT-4o in production right now** — open chat.ivxholding.com or the app and see it.

Two optional follow-ups when you want them: (1) push the local resilience fixes (provider failover + enterprise guard) so they ride the next deploy, (2) revoke the Render API key you pasted in chat and issue a fresh one. Say the word for either.
